author: gb9t
content:
Iter 67 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers:

- kernel/irq/00-overview.md: full IRQ subsystem — irqdesc (sparse radix-tree), irqdomain (hierarchical alloc cascade), chip (generic flow handlers), handle (generic_handle_irq), manage (request_irq/threaded/affinity), affinity (NUMA-spread), migration + cpuhotplug, matrix (per-CPU vector pool), msi (generic MSI domain framework), resend, dummychip, generic-chip, ipi + ipi-mux, proc (/proc/interrupts + /proc/irq/N/), debugfs, devres, pm (wakeup IRQ), kexec, spurious (auto-disable), irq-sim, autoprobe, plus softirq + tasklet from kernel/softirq.c. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 23 Tier-3 children declared.
- kernel/dma/00-overview.md: full DMA-API subsystem — mapping core dispatch, dma-direct (phys_to_dma + bounce-fallback), swiotlb (incl SEV/TDX confidential-guest path), coherent (per-device pools), contiguous CMA (global + per-numa + per-device), atomic-pool, remap (cache-attr changes), debug (CONFIG_DMA_API_DEBUG), map_benchmark, ops_helpers, dummy. Plus dma-buf full surface from drivers/dma-buf/: dma-buf core + dma-resv + dma-fence chain, dma-heap (system/cma/system-uncached), udmabuf, sync_file. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 15 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 172 .design docs, 37 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 22 sub-tier-2). Foundation layer (irq + dma + iommu + vfio + kvm + pci + drivers/base + perf + bpf + time) now Tier-2-complete.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-irq-overview, design-kernel-dma-overview.

Iter 68 plan: drivers/nvme/00-overview.md (NVMe host stack — core + pci-transport + tcp + rdma + fabrics + multipath + zns + nvmet target — biggest single driver in tree by usage) + drivers/scsi/00-overview.md (SCSI middle layer + hosts + ULDs + libsas + libfc + iscsi + target — second biggest).
